headline: General Mills faces mounting headwinds as volume declines and profit pressures weigh on recovery
summary: General Mills Inc (NYSE:GIS, XETRA:GRM) is navigating a difficult stretch, with deteriorating North America Retail volumes, weak category trends, and a series of mechanical profit headwinds clouding the outlook for fiscal 2027, according to a Jefferies analysis. Nielsen data shows NAR volumes...

headline: Brad Blum Knows How To Make Something From Nothing
summary: Brad Blum knows better than most that it's never what you say that makes a great leader.  Few actions in Blum's lifetime reflect that better than when, as a product manager for the Wheaties cereal brand at General Mills, he was touring a cereal production facility back in the mid-1980s, when a Black factory worker looked Blum in the eye and asked: Why hasn't a Black person been on a Wheaties package?  Blum had no answer.

headline: Why Hasbro’s Gina Goetter sees finance and operations as one role
summary: As both CFO and COO, Goetter says the two functions are now inseparable, requiring leaders to set up frameworks to handle dual responsibilities, develop talent and help drive decision-making.
